group.name: SA Accounting — Client Details
group.description: South African accounting-specific fields for client entities

fields.name: Trading As
fields.description: Trading name if different from registered name

fields.name: SARS Tax Reference
fields.description: Income tax reference number issued by SARS

fields.name: SARS eFiling Profile Number
fields.description: Client's SARS eFiling profile number for electronic filing

fields.name: Industry (SIC Code)
fields.description: SARS Standard Industrial Classification code for tax returns

fields.name: Postal Address
fields.description: Postal address if different from registered address

fields.name: FICA Verified
fields.description: FICA/KYC verification status for this client

fields.name: Referred By
fields.description: Source of client referral for tracking
